summary.notes: All 75 Mercedes-Benz vehicles verified. All model years valid for US market as of April 2026.

vehicles.notes: New H247 generation with taller stance
Final year of X253 generation in US. X254 started 2023.

C-Class.W204: 2008-2014 in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 16-18 inch.
C-Class.W205: 2015-2021 in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 17-19 inch.
C-Class.W206: 2022-present in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. Lug bolt M14x1.5 (changed from M12x1.5). OEM wheels 18-20 inch.

CLA.C117: 2014-2019 in US (launched 2014 as Mercedes' entry-level sedan). Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 17-19 inch.
CLA.C118: 2020-present in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 18-20 inch.

E-Class.W210: 2000-2002 in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 16-18 inch.
E-Class.W211: 2003-2009 in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 16-18 inch.
E-Class.W212: 2010-2016 in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 17-19 inch.
E-Class.W213: 2017-2023 in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 17-20 inch.
E-Class.W214: 2024-present in US. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 18-20 inch.

GLA.X156: 2015-2020 in US (launched as 2015 MY). Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 17-19 inch.
GLA.H247: 2021-present in US. New generation with taller stance. Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 18-19 inch.

GLC.X253: 2016-2022 in US (replaced GLK). Bolt: 5x112, Hub: 66.6mm. OEM wheels 18-21 inch.
